name: Cyclops
intro: Cyclops, the Starsoul Magician, is a hero in Mobile Legends: Bang Bang .

abilities.name: Starlit Hourglass
abilities.description: Buff Each time Cyclops hits an enemy with his skills, all his skill cooldowns are reduced by 0.5s. Skill terms Cooldown The time needed for casting the skill one more time, which can be affected by CD Reduction (unless otherwise stated).

abilities.name: Stardust Shock
abilities.description: AOE Cyclops casts two Stardust Disks, each dealing 275–400 (+60% Total Magic Power) Magic Damage to enemies in its path. Skill terms Magic Skill Deal Magic DMG to enemies. Triggers Spell Vamp.

abilities.name: Planets Attack
abilities.description: Cyclops conjures Starlit Spheres around himself while gaining 30% Movement Speed for 2s. The spheres will automatically seek and attack nearby enemies (prioritizes enemy heroes), exploding on collision and dealing 200–350 (+50% Total Magic Power) Magic Damage to the enemy. Enemies hit by multiple sphere will take reduced damage after the first hit. Skill terms Magic Skill Deal Magic DMG to enemies. Triggers Spell Vamp. Movement Speed Movement Speed on the battlefield. Usually Calculated and Actual Movement Speed is equal. But when Movement Speed is below 230 or over 420 both Slowdown and Speedup Effect will decay. Calculated Movement Speed = Basic Movement Speed × (100% + All Speedup Effect% - All Slowdown Effect%).

abilities.name: Star Power Lockdown
abilities.description: Cyclops creates a Planetary Sphere and sends it after target enemy hero or Creep, dealing 500–800 (+220% Total Magic Power) Magic Damage and immobilizing them for 1-2s (increases with travel distance). Skill terms Immobilized A state that prevents a target from moving. The target can't use Blink within the duration. Magic Skill Deal Magic DMG to enemies. Triggers Spell Vamp.
